twitch_info.title: Highlight: 217+ Hours of Enhanced Interrogation Techniques

message.body: hello!! i see youre grinding ds
yes, I am practicing at 0.8 speed
I loved your clear, by the way
only practice today or grinding original game soon?
haha that was a shock for me
I'm not planning on grinding the original game until I get more comfortable
maybe in a few months
hey you almost got it!
yeah, the game is substantially easier at 0.8 speed
i got insanely free final on my clear
the best I've done at 1.0 speed is going from the unfair teleporting bursts attack to the end
ive never seen that free final attack before
yeah, the rng on many of the final attacks for your clear was very nice
falling bursts was kinda scary
first cycle
yeah, I mean the stuff after eafewafewaijufhe or whatever the deadsplit calls it
i assume it would be pretty hard to play it on original speed at this point
after 0.8 play
I can show you how I play at original speed
would be nice to see
god youre playing the game
first attempt and already disgusting arrows
yeah, I also have a bunch of experience at 1.0 already
maybe about 140 hours
anyway youre so god damn consistent on attacks here
thanks for the compliment, I still feel like I need a lot of work though
is there something to develop yet
as it, what I need to work on?
I'm feeling very bad at the teleporting bursts, and also at the falling section, but that is early on so I don't want to practice it too much. also, final
idk i feel like with this consistentcy youd clear this game in a week
I mean, I just did like 30 attempts and didn't get anything through arrows
that's like 50 hours worth of attempts right there right?
hows the fall attack for you tho
which attack is that again?
this one?
with blocks
that was such a hard attack
on my early grind
until i finally get used to it
I don't have much practice with it, and I agree, it's hard, but it seems like people get really consistent at it eventually
i had been watching ds clears so many times just to get some consistency
on this attack
the fall?
the fall the fall
yeah, I'm copying blue's strats
let me check yours
especially the moment when blocks are going at high speed and there are 2 bursts from left and right
there can be literally unfair rng there
ah yes, you do something like what casualcrap does
yes, that spot is really dangerous
and i just wanted to develop a super strat for it
If you do what I do you are a little bit safer for the first two bursts but it makes the jump after more dangerous
i was watching bloggerop ds grind streams
he had such a consistency on the fall
so i learned his strat for the fall
did it work?
you need to fall down as fast as you can after landing on the block
and then do a mini jump after some time
I learned it a while back, it's just hard to remember
are any of these bullets targeted?
I never understood if they were completely random
of what bullets
in the fall
there are no targeted bullets on the fall
maybe I didn't correctly understand you
no, you understand, thanks for the information
oh oh oh oh i remembered the worst attack in ds!! walk or die
that was such a roadblock for me
which one is that?
as deadsplit says
that one?
mm
bullets going to the left at the high speed
oh yes, that attack is insanely hard
it, shower, and final are the hardest
and arrows from the top and you need to avoid them by walking
idk i was dying on walk or die SO many times
it can also be completely free if you are lucky
that goes for a lot of attacks though
i even asked mastermaxify for an advice
for this attack
what did he say?
in comments to his ds clear video
he said that you need to jump as little as possible
and that this is a roadblock for people
I agree with him
jumping on that attack is very dangerous because there is rarely anywhere to land
i was too mad to this attack
i had been stuck for months because of it
until i finally got used
so your consistency got better?
sure
you can't even imagine how good i felt when passed the shower attack
first time
and died on bursts immediately you know
how many hours did it take? to pass shower once?
i dont remember actually
40 hours?
something like that
interesting
I have only done about 5 hours of attempts and my pb is walk or die
but of course, that's no where near passing shower
it scares me a lot to think it will take me that long just to get past shower, only to have the rest of the avoidance to go through
i think after practicing that much you'll literally clear it without any effort
I wish, but it seems unrealistic to me. I'm still worse than bloggerop, and he took 180 hours right?
it took almost 200 hrs for bloggerop
or i am wrong
i don't remember???
something like that yeah
but it seems like even highly skilled players, like razzor, for instance, still take like 50 hours to beat this game
depending a lot of how lucky they get on final
razzor's second clear took him 3 hrs
and the first
yes
sin kun also recleared in 5 hours
his first was 15, but he first-tried final
and you know about bloggerop, he recleared the game recently
as well
oh, I was unaware
so much for "not clearing any more hard avoidance" or whatever he said in the video description
feels like it took him no effort to reclear
after ~200 hrs of grinding
"not clearing hard avoidances" and then ao stage moment
frankly, I did not believe it for a second. You don't spend hours on games ever day for months, and then just completely quit.
well, now he plays ordinary needle games
so that may be true
maybe. what's the next game your going to play, by the way?
i am grinding ao
3 outro attempts already
that's great, I'd imagine is much easier compared to destruction state?
61 hours so far
yes it surely is
but patterns are kinda crappy to learn
yeah, I will never play it because of that
probably same for mayumushi
my pattern skill is legendarily bad
especially on my early gribd where i had to go through the whole first half of the avoidance just to die to patterns
not knowing what exactly i died to
It takes a enourmous amount of time to learn stuff without practice tools, I would never do it myself, but I respect that determination
thank god i passed this period of learning patterns
and now, just grind
waiting
yeah, now it's just about the attempts
for this monent
final is also apparently very unfair
im excited to try final attack
and surely die to the last bullet
I hope you first try it, to keep the streak going
as maxify did
never die to a final attack ever LUL
just be lucky as i was in my ds clear 4Head
I'm okay with just a fraction of your luck
just give me enough of it to first try final and I'm happy
yeah
that clear might be the luckiest clear I've ever seen too
maybe vox diamond absolute is luckier
i still can't believe how kind rng was to me
I'd estimate you got 1/500 rng
just my guess
and well i somehow didn't choke last three attacks as well
yeah, that's the really impressive part
it's insanely clutch to execute those patterns without ever having done them before
waiting for ao clear of vox absolute...)
it could be a long time before that happens
the last part of the game is so full of luck checks
as i said on my stream after clear, i only knew strats
theoretically
how to make it
and yeah the practice room it pretty poor on my ds ver
only 2 warps
yeah, I added all these
it's very helpful
I am not good enough to beat the game with only blue's practice warps
oh you did it?
blue is greedy.......
yes, I know a bit of programming (you don't need much) and I decompiled the game and added some more warps
I have 11 of them
but the first warp is still bugged
it skips part of the avoidance so I don't use it, but it's not useful practice anyway so I don't need to fix it
funny moment: i was that dumb that i thought that downloading decompiler.exe and move it to the game folder
is enough
to decompile
yeah, you have to drag the game over it
that truly describes my level of programming skill
huh?
i was right?
well, you drag Destruction State.exe over Decompiler.exe
then it does it's thing and creates the gmk
i did it
and it created gamemaker file
and i didn't know what to do with it
you can open it after install gamemaker
but at that point if you don't know a little gamemaker programming you are stuck
so basically i did 50% of decompiling without knowing how to
decompiling is half the battle Kappa
i thought for a second you started playing the original game
I could do some attempts if you want
do as you wish
okay, maybe some of those then
not going to clear, just for fun
that is your grind, if you feel to practice more no one forbids
you know
yeah, I practice way more than everyone else
ratiowise
nevertheless id say i want to hear some banger t pazolite censored music
then here it you shall
the first 30 seconds of it, anyway
that's basically the reason why i started grinding the game
the song is such a bop
it's probably his best
I am generally not a fan of his music though
but the avoidance is so cool I had to play and clear
elaborated strats for first patterns tho
rainydayta does it too
he did it before me, but I didn't discover until later
did i write the right word
elaborated
I don't know i doubt haha
you probably meant "elaborate" instead
elaborate is an adjective, elaborated is a past tense verb
oh
thanks for info
but it was still clear what you meant, don't worry
yeah, I'm happy to help
redire also like to have some english lessons, it's fun
i love redire eng skills
he literally can talk with chat without any effort
especially during nervous moments
his english is incredible
such as third phase on kamilia boss on his wr
he still could talk
I probably would not know he was not native, except for some very rare mispronunciations
during it
to speak in a second language while clearing k3 is indeed amazing
yeah he is russian guy as well as me
and I am very thankful that he does it, because I like to watch his streams a lot and I only understand english and a small amount of german
just want to have his eng level
I am very annoyed by the attack I just died to. it looks the same as the attack near the end, but the strat is different and I keep getting confused
if you want to get to his level, it seems like the best way is to stream in english
oh i overlooked
it is the target attack after the bullets bounce around
right before the intro shenanigans
he was streaming in english all time since his start of grinding k3
which was around 5 yrs ago
oh, i see
i just jump to the left not staying in the left corner
yeah, I do that too
except I also jump to the right after
i stay here a bit far to the right from the corner
and just dodge this target by full jumping to the left
yeah, the dodge is not hard to execute, but I keep executing the dodge I do for the attack before disgusting arrows instead, because I'm getting confused
my worst fear is that the reverse will happen and I will throw a run 1:20 minutes in
youll surely get used to it after some attempts
yes, I think so
reverse?
as in, for the attack at the end, I do the strat for the attack at the beginning, and die
oooh
this would be not great
thank god i got some composure during pb
in my experience, I cannot remain calm unless I have died to it so much I don't care anymore
and again, i wrote a sentence and now i doubt what exactly i said
maybe "I kept my composure" would be better
yessss
god, how pleasant for me to talk with foreigners
especially when they understand me, somehow
your english is very good
I think a lot of people think it's worse than it really is
it is decent to talk with people, but not as good as i want it to be
but the truth is, they can communicate just fine
i keep improving it
oh yes, to really make it perfect, that is a very long struggle
with time
harder than destruction state
surely
but I think you will get even better as long as you keep focusing on it. Is there anything in particular you want to use it for other than talking to english speakers online?
i want to connect my life with english language
going to university to translation faculty
or how it is called in eng
you want to be an english professor at a university?
working as a translator or smth
be a translator sounds like it would be cool. what would you translate at the university?
but as i said my eng level is not that good for this decision
so far
but i am still schoolboy
well, plenty of time to learn then
who knows how it will be in the future
I think the reason redire has good english is because he was focused on it from an early age
although I do get the impression he did not like his school very much
he said it?
well, he said he went to a school that taught a lot of english, I think
i saw his school photos that were uploaded on his page
but I do not think he specifically said he did not like the school, that was just what I suspected
which page? twitch?
vk
is there a link?
you know what is this?
I don't, other than that it must be a website
social network for russians
ah, makes sense
like facebook or twitter
his real name is alexey
oh really? his github listed a different name
now I see it says Alex Nikiforov
which seems to agree with what you said
nikiforov yesssss
well i don't like to judge things by photos, but it feels like he gad a good time in school
had*
that's good if that's the case
I'm sure that there were good times as well as bad
his job though, he definitely does not seem to like

I guess programming jobs are stressful
he's working as it specialist
so, networking?
don't know actually
I know another guy who does it, jrchadwick, who streams on twitch, and some of the stuff he has to put up with at work sounds annoying
but overall he seems happy with it
i may say something wrong about his job, my memory is you know
that's okay
mine is also not very good
I wish it were better for avoidance attacks too
i wanted to say if you know redire's second twitch account
notredire

but i remembered you are working with avoidance hall of fame
well,
so you know his ao clear

and invincible alien

your work with hof is also finding clears? or something else
it's clears

like writing names in the sheet
I do the whole row: names, date, clear video
yeah i mean that
by the way what is your other fangames you played?
in order, k3 flandre scarlet, some melanzana, and fish
twitch clips showed you werent playing ds all time
the only other ones I streamed were I wanna be the G and revolving lantern
maybe 2 hours total between those
I have a little bit of time in a lot of random hard barrage games
k3 flandre and then you thought like "no, im out of it, that's enough k3 for me"
technically, I got to shine and bright, and then that
I just got bored I guess
and I learned about melanzana
but then I learned I suck at patterns, it took me 60 hours to get to 32 seconds
oh
that's when I decided to just do fish
but what about melanzana practice tool
it would've helped you
or you were using it

I definitely would've used it if I had access to it
i thought for maxify grind
no
not mir's
it was mir's
you can see on the HoF
there is a note on mir's time that says "includes practice time"
i actually thought maxify is the only one who was practicing melanzana
now, I think that he only had version 0.4, and someone finished up the practice tool for mastermaxify
like ~50 hours spent on it
while everyone else spent 100+
mir is not as good as max, I'm afraid
just_raff apparently also used it
oh, but additionally, I don't think mir had the practice tool at the beginning of his grind either, so that might factor into his higher playtime
you almost did a fresh strat for the fall
where you go down a block when blocks go at high speed
and fulljump once
my strat is supposed to be to land on that block, walk off to dodge the bullets on the right, jump back on, then jump over the bullets from below
this also works
it is what blue does
I am copying him
blue?? i haven't seen blue ds clear
